-spec solve(str) -> integer().
solve(Str) ->
    OriginalCount = original_count(Str),
    MaxCount = find_max_count(Str, OriginalCount),
    MaxCount.

original_count(S) ->
    LCount = count_char(S, $L),
    CCount = count_char(S, $C),
    TCount = count_char(S, $T),
    OriginalCount = 0,
    LIndex = 0,
    while(LIndex < length(S), LIndex1, OriginalCount1) ->
        case lists:nth(LIndex + 1, S) of
            $L ->
                CIndex = LIndex + 2,
                while(CIndex < length(S), CIndex1, OriginalCount1) ->
                    case lists:nth(CIndex + 1, S) of
                        $C ->
                            TIndex = CIndex + 2,
                            while(TIndex < length(S), TIndex1, OriginalCount1) ->
                                case lists:nth(TIndex + 1, S) of
                                    $T ->
                                        OriginalCount1 + 1,
                                        TIndex1 = TIndex + 1;
                                    _ ->
                                        TIndex1 = TIndex + 1
                                end,
                                CIndex1 = CIndex + 1
                            end,
                            LIndex1 = LIndex + 1;
                    _ ->
                        CIndex1 = CIndex + 1
                    end,
                    LIndex1 = LIndex + 1
                end,
                OriginalCount1
        end,
        LIndex1 = LIndex + 1
    end.

find_max_count(S, OriginalCount) ->
    MaxCount = OriginalCount,
    LIndex = 0,
    while(LIndex < length(S), LIndex1, MaxCount1) ->
        TempS = insert_char(S, $L, LIndex),
        Count = count_subsequences(TempS),
        MaxCount1 = max(MaxCount1, Count),
        LIndex1 = LIndex + 1
    end,
    LIndex = 0,
    while(LIndex < length(S), LIndex1, MaxCount1) ->
        TempS = insert_char(S, $C, LIndex),
        Count = count_subsequences(TempS),
        MaxCount1 = max(MaxCount1, Count),
        LIndex1 = LIndex + 1
    end,
    LIndex = 0,
    while(LIndex < length(S), LIndex1, MaxCount1) ->
        TempS = insert_char(S, $T, LIndex),
        Count = count_subsequences(TempS),
        MaxCount1 = max(MaxCount1, Count),
        LIndex1 = LIndex + 1
    end,
    MaxCount1.

count_char(S, Char) ->
    Count = 0,
    Index = 0,
    while(Index < length(S), Index1, Count1) ->
        case lists:nth(Index + 1, S) of
            Char ->
                Count1 + 1,
                Index1 = Index + 1;
            _ ->
                Index1 = Index + 1
        end
    end.

insert_char(S, Char, Index) ->
    Substring1 = lists:sublist(S, Index),
    Substring2 = lists:sublist(S, Index + 1, length(S) - Index),
    Substring1 ++ [Char] ++ Substring2.

count_subsequences(S) ->
    Count = 0,
    LIndex = 0,
    while(LIndex < length(S), LIndex1, Count1) ->
        case lists:nth(LIndex + 1, S) of
            $L ->
                CIndex = LIndex + 2,
                while(CIndex < length(S), CIndex1, Count1) ->
                    case lists:nth(CIndex + 1, S) of
                        $C ->
                            TIndex = CIndex + 2,
                            while(TIndex < length(S), TIndex1, Count1) ->
                                case lists:nth(TIndex + 1, S) of

                                        TIndex1 = TIndex + 1;
                                    _ ->
                                        TIndex1 = TIndex + 1
                                end,
                                CIndex1 = CIndex + 1
                            end,
                            LIndex1 = LIndex + 1;
                    _ ->
                        CIndex1 = CIndex + 1
                    end,
                    LIndex1 = LIndex + 1
                end,
                Count1
        end,
        LIndex1 = LIndex + 1
    end.

        Count = count_subsequences(TempStr),
